summary: Insurance management application for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS - a comprehensive system for managing customers, policies, expiration alerts, document uploads, and PDF generation for an IRDAI registered insurance partner
architectural_notes: Insurance management application with customer and policy tracking
Multi-entity data model: customers, policies, documents, alerts
Document upload capability for policy files
Alert system for policy/tax expiration tracking
Filter and search capabilities across entities
Professional UI design suitable for insurance business
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional insurance business logo for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS with shield or protection symbolism in blue and gold tones (logo.dim_200x200.png)

existing_features.title: Create a customer management system with the ability to add new customers including fields for name, phone number, and address
Implement customer list view with search and filter capabilities
Create policy management system with fields for policy number, policy type, insurance company name, customer assignment, start date, and expiry date
Create alerts and notifications system that highlights policies expiring soon, insurance renewal reminders, and road tax expiry alerts
Build dashboard showing upcoming renewals and expirations with summary metrics
Implement navigation menu with sections for Dashboard, Customers, Policies, Alerts, Help, Support, and Legal

Apply company branding throughout the application with company name 'KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS', tagline 'IRDAI Registered Insurance Partner | Insurance | CA | Legal', and contact information '6290932283, krishnatechandsolutions@gmail.com'
Design a professional, insurance-business-appropriate interface with clear navigation, data tables for listings, and visual alert indicators for expiring policies

new_feature_requests.summary: Customer management system with add, view, search/filter functionality
Policy management with policy details, document uploads, customer linking, and road tax tracking
Alerts and notifications system for policy expiration, insurance renewals, and road tax expiry
Dashboard showing upcoming renewals and expirations
Navigation menu with sections: Dashboard, Customers, Policies, Alerts, Help, Support, Legal
PDF generation for customer data and policy details reports
Professional branding with company name, tagline, and contact information
Implement policy document upload functionality with file storage
Add road tax expiry date tracking to policy records
Add quick access 'Add Policy' option in navigation and filter policies by insurance company
Implement PDF generation for customer data reports and policy details reports with export functionality

projectName: KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS Insurance Management
